name: ultrahuman-insights
title: Ultrahuman Insights
description: Smart insights, AI tools, and trend charts for your Ultrahuman Ring AIR.
author: aryan_rustagi

preferences.name: apiToken
preferences.title: API Token
preferences.description: Your Ultrahuman Partner API token (from partner.ultrahuman.com)

commands.name: menu-bar
commands.title: Menu Bar Sleep Score
commands.description: Show last night's Ultrahuman sleep score in the macOS menu bar, color-coded by status.

commands.name: today
commands.title: Today's Health
commands.description: View every available Ultrahuman metric for today with smart insights and 7-day deltas.

commands.name: sleep
commands.title: Sleep Detail
commands.description: Last night's sleep score, stages, vitals, and quality breakdown.

commands.name: hrv
commands.title: HRV & Heart Rate
commands.description: Today's HRV and resting heart rate with 7-day trend charts.

commands.name: recovery
commands.title: Recovery & Movement
commands.description: Recovery, Movement, and Sleep indices with daily trends and personalised insights.

commands.name: trends
commands.title: 7-Day Trends
commands.description: Per-day history for every Ultrahuman metric over the last 7 days.

tools.name: get-today
tools.title: Get Today's Metrics
tools.description: Get a snapshot of all of today's Ultrahuman metrics, including sleep, HRV, recovery, and movement.

tools.name: get-metric
tools.title: Get One Metric
tools.description: Get a single Ultrahuman metric for a specific date.

tools.name: get-trend
tools.title: Get Metric Trend
tools.description: Get N days of history (1–7) for a single Ultrahuman metric.
